channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: The 49ers bring back Kyle Juszczyk days after cutting him, AP source says
item.description: Fullback Kyle Juszczyk is returning to the San Francisco 49ers on a two-year, $8 million contract just days after being cut, according to a person familiar with the deal.
item.dc:creator: Josh Dubow, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Rising to the occasion, Shohei Ohtani hits 2-run HR in return to Japan against Yomiuri Giants
item.description: Japanese star Shohei Ohtani showed off some prodigious power in his return to the Tokyo Dome on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: David Brandt, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Dodgers' Betts dealing with illness in Japan, Roberts hopeful he'll be ready for opening day
item.description: TOKYO (AP) — Shortstop Mookie Betts will miss the Los Angeles Dodgers' two exhibition games in Japan because of an illness, manager Dave Roberts said Saturday.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lewis Hamilton has tough start with Ferrari, qualifying eighth in F1 Australian GP
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Lewis Hamilton’s Ferrari odyssey got off to a tough start on Saturday after the British driver qualified in eighth for Sunday's Australian Grand Prix.
item.dc:creator: STEWART BELL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Plucky Lakers nearly beat Nuggets despite Luka Doncic, LeBron James among LA's sidelined starters
item.description: DENVER (AP) — Luka Doncic sat out the Los Angeles Lakers' 131-126 loss at Denver on Friday night, cheering on his scrappy, short-handed teammates who nearly pulled off a shocker without four starters.
item.dc:creator: ARNIE STAPLETON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ejiofor powers No. 6 St. John's past No. 25 Marquette 79-63 into 1st Big East final since 2000
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Zuby Ejiofor scored a career-high 33 points, a St. John's record in the Big East Tournament, and the sixth-ranked Red Storm pulled away from No. 25 Marquette 79-63 on Friday night to reach the conference championship game for the first time in 25 years.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 96 fits Hurricanes' Roslovic just right as he scores goal 2nd straight game
item.description: RALEIGH, N.C. (AP) — Jack Roslovic got his No. 96 jersey back, and he's wearing it well. The Carolina Hurricanes center scored a goal in a second straight game and he has four points over three games since reclaiming the number.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 1 Duke holds off furious North Carolina rally to win 74-71, reach ACC title game without Flagg
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — Kon Knueppel scored 17 points and No. 1 Duke held off a furious second half rally by North Carolina to beat its rival for the third time this season, 74-71 on Friday night to reach the Atlantic Coast Conference Tournament championship game.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: WNBA great Candace Parker highlights late Tennessee coach Pat Summitt's 'truly important' legacy
item.description: Former Tennessee star Candace Parker reflected on Pat Summitt's legacy and shared how she continues to apply the life lessons the legendary coach taught her.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jourdan Lewis becomes latest former Cowboys player to voice frustration with team
item.description: Jacksonville Jaguars defensive back Jourdan Lewis said he experienced moments of frustration during his eight-year stint with the Dallas Cowboys.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Poway and USD alum Connor Joe to play for his hometown Padres
item.description: As the San Diego Padres are gearing up for the start of the 2025 MLB season, a player who has his sights set on making the Opening Day roster with his hometown Friars is Poway resident Connor Joe.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Cooper Flagg and Maliq Brown miss No. 1 Duke's win against rival UNC in ACC semifinals
item.description: Top-ranked Duke played without Cooper Flagg and Maliq Brown in its win against rival North Carolina in the Atlantic Conference Tournament because of injuries.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Beard, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Hawkeyes' worst season in 7 years prompts firing of Fran McCaffery, program's all-time wins leader
item.description: Iowa fired coach Fran McCaffery on Friday after the Hawkeyes won their fewest games and had their lowest Big Ten regular-season finish in seven years. The 65-year-old McCaffery, who was under contract through 2028, had said last week that he intended to return for a 16th season rather than retire.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Caitlin Clark's boyfriend posts cryptic message after his dad is ejected from game and fired as Iowa coach
item.description: After Iowa men's basketball coach Fran McCaffery was reportedly fired, his son, Caitlin Clark's boyfriend Connor McCaffery, left a cryptic post on X.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bill Belichick requested his girlfriend be included on UNC emails: report
item.description: Bill Belichick reportedly requested staff members at UNC to include his 23-year-old girlfriend, Jordon Hudson, on emails regarding social media.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Not just Ohtani: Tokyo Series will showcase the depth of Japanese talent in Major League Baseball
item.description: TOKYO (AP) — The spotlight will be on slugger Shohei Ohtani this week when the superstar returns to Japan and leads the defending World Series champion Los Angeles Dodgers against the Chicago Cubs in the first two games of the Major League Baseball season at the Tokyo Dome.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bubble watch: Indiana and Xavier now feeling the heat with Texas and North Carolina closing strong
item.description: A look at the NCAA Tournament bubble picture: Missed opportunities Xavier and Indiana had chances to give their resumes a significant boost Thursday, but the Musketeers lost 89-87 to No. 25 Marquette, and Indiana fell 72-59 to No. 23 Oregon.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Column: Halas Hall is energized once more, but it's different than this time last year
item.description: The Chicago Bears have made significant offseason changes, including trading for DJ Moore and signing Grady Jarrett, in an attempt to turn their losing ways around and compete in the NFL.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: USF Women's Basketball going to NCAA Tournament
item.description: No. 3 South Florida (23-10) defeated No. 9 Rice (17-17), 69-62, in the 2025 American Women’s Basketball Championship final on Wednesday evening, March 12, at Dickies Arena in Fort Worth, Texas.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC

item.title: San Diego FC will take more action against discriminatory fan chants
item.description: San Diego FC has announced additional steps to limit discriminatory behavior by fans, including anti-discriminatory messaging, extra security, and enforcement of sanctions.
item.dc:creator: Sergio Robles, Fox 5

item.title: Utah moves closer to playoff berth with 3-2 victory
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - After blowing leads in their two previous meetings with the Anaheim Ducks this season, the Utah Hockey Club wasn't about to let it happen a third time.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Dad leads team to state tourney after coach's death
item.description: "I really think that we've helped him through that and he's helped us through this," said Rachel Cordell.
item.dc:creator: Adria Goins/KFOR, NewsNation

item.title: Saunders earns first team All-Big 12 honors
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Fresh off leading No. 17 BYU to its eighth straight win on Saturday, Richie Saunders was named the Big 12 Most Improved Player and claimed First Team All-Big honors. Egor Demin earned honorable mention all-conference and all-freshman accolades.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Giddey scores 26 to lead Bulls' comeback from 17 down to beat the Heat 114-109
item.description: Josh Giddey scored 26 points and the Chicago Bulls rallied from a 17-point, first-half deficit to beat the Miami Heat 114-109 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Chiefs wide receiver Xavier Worthy released after Texas district attorney declines to pursue charges
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — Xavier Worthy was released Saturday after a district attorney in Texas declined to pursue charges against the Kansas City Chiefs wide receiver following an arrest in which he had been accused of felony domestic violence.
item.dc:creator: JIM VERTUNO and DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5
